source.name: USGS/IAU Gazetteer of Planetary Nomenclature - Mars center points

priorityTiers.1: Top roughly 500 largest or mission/science-important features

features.name: Valles Marineris
features.origin: General name of the system of canyons honoring the scientific team of the Mariner 9 program.

features.name: Amazonis Planitia
features.origin: Classical albedo feature name; home of the Amazons.

features.name: Syrtis Major Planum
features.origin: Albedo feature name; changed from Planitia to Planum.

features.name: Cerberus Fossae
features.origin: From albedo feature at 10n, 212W. Changed from Cerberus Rupes.

features.name: Phlegra Dorsa
features.origin: Named for classical albedo feature at 35N, 195W.

features.name: Tiu Valles
features.origin: Word for "Mars" in old English (West Germanic).

features.name: Arcadia Dorsa
features.origin: Named for classical albedo feature at 45N, 120W.

features.name: Utopia Rupes
features.origin: Named for calssical albedo feature at 55N, 260W.

features.name: Labeatis Fossae
features.origin: Previously named feature at 30N, 75W; expanded coordinates.

features.name: Granicus Valles
features.origin: Ancient name for river in Turkey.

features.name: Hephaestus Rupes
features.origin: Named for classical albedo feature at 20N, 240W.

features.name: Isidis Dorsa
features.origin: Named for classical albedo feature at 25N, 270W.

features.name: Ogygis Planum
features.origin: From the nearby classical albedo feature Ogygis Regio.

features.name: Naktong Vallis
features.origin: Modern name for river in the Republic of Korea.

features.name: Samara Valles
features.origin: Ancient name for modern Somme River, France.

features.name: Al Qahira Vallis
features.origin: Word for 'Mars' in Arabic, Indonesian, Malay.

features.name: Liris Valles
features.origin: Ancient name for modern Liri River, Italy.

features.name: Nanedi Valles
features.origin: Word for "planet" in Sesotho, national language of Lesotho, Africa.

features.name: Panchaia Rupes
features.origin: Named for classical albedo feature at 62N, 220W.

features.name: Naro Vallis
features.origin: Ancient name for modern Neretva River, Yugoslavia.

features.name: Axius Valles
features.origin: Ancient European River (Vardar River of Greece).

features.name: Ravius Valles
features.origin: Classical name for river in N.W. Ireland.

features.name: Tisia Valles
features.origin: Ancient name for modern Tisza River, Ukraine.

features.name: Adamas Labyrinthus
features.origin: Classical albedo feature name; "A River of Diamonds"; today's River Sarbarnarekha in India.

features.name: Eos Chaos
features.origin: Greek name of Aurora; albedo feature.

features.name: Locras Valles
features.origin: Ancient name for river on Corsica.

features.name: Sungari Vallis
features.origin: River in China, also known as Songhua Jiang.

features.name: Indus Vallis
features.origin: Ancient and modern name for river in Pakistan.

features.name: Echus Chaos
features.origin: From albedo feature Echus Lacus at 1N, 90W.

features.name: Parana Valles
features.origin: Ancient and modern name for South American river (Brazil, Argentina).

features.name: Echus Palus
features.origin: Classical albedo feature name, Echus Lacus.

features.name: Arnus Vallis
features.origin: Classical and present day Arno River in Tuscany, Italy (previously named Arena Rupes).

features.name: Scandia Cavi
features.origin: Named for classical albedo feature at 65N, 150W.

features.name: Colles Nili
features.origin: From classical albedo feature Portus Nili, at 38N, 295W.

features.name: Sabrina Vallis
features.origin: Classical name for present Severn River, England.

features.name: Athabasca Valles
features.origin: River in Canada. (Changed from Athabasca Vallis.)

features.name: Scamander Vallis
features.origin: Ancient name of river at Troy (modern Turkey).

features.name: Frento Vallis
features.origin: Classical name for river in Italy.

features.name: Cusus Valles
features.origin: Classical name for modern Hron River in Czechoslovakia.

features.name: Calydon Fossa
features.origin: The son of Ares and Astynome.

features.name: Bashkaus Valles
features.origin: River in the Altai Republic, Russia.

features.name: Thyles Rupes
features.origin: Name and feature changes 1984 from Ultimi Cavi and Thyles Chasma.

features.name: Durius Valles
features.origin: Classical name for modern Douro River, Portugal.

features.name: Licus Vallis
features.origin: Ancient name for modern Lech River, France.

features.name: Lethe Vallis
features.origin: River in Katmai National Monument, Alaska, USA.

features.name: Hypanis Valles
features.origin: Classical name for river in Scythia; present Kuban River in Russia.

features.name: Sabis Vallis
features.origin: Classical name for present Sambre River in France and Belgium.

features.name: Nen Valles
features.origin: Modern river in Heilongjiang Province, China.

features.name: Tader Valles
features.origin: Ancient name for present Segura River, Spain.

features.name: Vistula Valles
features.origin: Classical name for modern Wistla River in Poland.

features.name: Acheron Catena
features.origin: Named for classical albedo feature at 35N, 140W.

features.name: Trebia Valles
features.origin: Classical name for modern Trebbia River, Italy.

features.name: Elaver Vallis
features.origin: Classical name for modern Allier River, France.

features.name: Scandia Tholi
features.origin: Named for classical albedo feature at 65N, 150W.

features.name: Oltis Valles
features.origin: Ancient name for modern Lot river, France.

features.name: Cydonia Colles
features.origin: Named for classical albedo feature at 50N, 355W.

features.name: Cydonia Labyrinthus
features.origin: Named for classical albedo feature at 50N, 355W.

features.name: Herschel
features.origin: John F.; British astronomer (1792-1871); William H.; British astronomer (1738-1822).

features.name: Juventae Mons
features.origin: Named for classical albedo feature name, Juventae Fons.

features.name: Tagus Valles
features.origin: Ancient and modern river in Spain, Portugal.

features.name: Arsinoes Chaos
features.origin: Daughter of Ptolomy Lagun and Bernice.

features.name: Nia Vallis
features.origin: Lowell canal name; also classical river name.

features.name: Doanus Vallis
features.origin: Classical river shown in Ptolemy's map; may be modern Mekong River of Burma.

features.name: Pallacopas Vallis
features.origin: Lowell canal name; also classical river name.

features.name: Buvinda Vallis
features.origin: Classical river in Hibernia; present Boyne River, Ireland.

features.name: Ochus Valles
features.origin: Classical name for present Hari-Rud River in Turkmenistan.

features.name: Artynia Catena
features.origin: Named for classical albedo feature at 54N, 137W.

features.name: Apsus Vallis
features.origin: Classical river in ancient Macedonia, present-day Greece.

features.name: Drilon Vallis
features.origin: Classical name for present Drin River, Albania.

features.name: Clota Vallis
features.origin: Ancient name for present River Clyde, Scotland.

features.name: Ortygia Colles
features.origin: Named for classical albedo feature at 65N, 350W.

features.name: Oxia Dorsum
features.origin: Named for classical albedo feature name at 25N, 24W.

features.name: Amazonis Sulci
features.origin: Albedo feature name; home of the Amazons.

features.name: Abalos Colles
features.origin: Named for classical albedo feature at 72N, 70W.

features.name: Schmidt
features.origin: Johann F.; German astronomer (1825-1884); Otto Y.; Russian geophysicist (1891-1956).

features.name: Mutch
features.origin: Dr. Thomas A.; American geologist, Viking Lander Imaging Team leader (1931-1980).

features.name: Tyras Vallis
features.origin: Classical name for present Dniester River, Ukraine.

features.name: Phillips
features.origin: John; British geologist (1800-1874). Theodore E.; British astronomer (1868-1942).

features.name: Amphitrites Patera
features.origin: Mare Amphitrites; classical albedo feature name.

features.name: Simois
features.origin: Classical albedo feature name of Greek origin, Simois.

features.name: Varus Valles
features.origin: Classical name for present Var River, France.

features.name: Minio Vallis
features.origin: Classical name for river in Italy.

features.name: Darwin
features.origin: Charles R.; British naturalist (1809-1882) and George H.; British astronomer (1845-1912).

features.name: Iberus Vallis
features.origin: Classical name for river present Ebro River in NE Spain.

features.name: Arimanes Rupes
features.origin: Albedo feature; classical Persian deity of wickedness.

features.name: Henry
features.origin: Paul; French astronomer (1848-1905). Prosper; French astronomer (1849-1903).

features.name: Ogygis Rupes
features.origin: Named from the classical albedo feature name Ogygis Regio.

features.name: Juventae Mensa
features.origin: Classical albedo feature name, Juventae Fons

features.name: Surinda Valles
features.origin: Name proposed by Soviets; found on Mars-5 Map.

features.name: Hebes Mensa
features.origin: Classical albedo feature; name of goddess of youth.

features.name: Dejnev
features.origin: Semen Ivanovich; Russian geographer, explorer, and navigator (1605-1673).

features.name: Stura Vallis
features.origin: Classical river east of Rome, Italy.

features.name: Caralis Chaos
features.origin: After Caralis Fons, classical albedo feature named after Caralis Lacus, now Beysehir Gölü, in Isauria (Asia Minor).

features.name: Gorgonum Mons
features.origin: Classical albedo feature name of Greek origin, Gorgonum Sinus.

features.name: Lomonosov
features.origin: Mikhail Vasilievich; Russian poet, scientist, and grammarian (1711-1765).

features.name: Baetis Chasma
features.origin: From classical albedo feature at 5S, 60W; changed from Iamunae Chasma.

features.name: Cantabras Dorsum
features.origin: From nearby albedo feature Cantabras, at 10N, 5W.

features.name: Slipher
features.origin: Vesto M.; American astronomer (1875-1969); Earl C.; American astronomer (1883-1964).

features.name: Rayleigh
features.origin: Strutt, John W., third Baron Rayleigh; British physicist (1842-1919).

features.name: Campbell
features.origin: John W.; Canadian physicist (1889-1955). William W.; American astronomer (1862-1938).

features.name: Matrona Vallis
features.origin: Classical name for present Marne River, France.

features.name: Abus Vallis
features.origin: Classical name for Humber River in England.

features.name: Muller
features.origin: Hermann J.; American geneticist (1890-1967), and Carl H.; German astronomer (1851-1925).

features.name: Phlegra
features.origin: "Burning plain;" in Chalcidian Peninsula of Greece where Zeus hurled thunderbolts at Titans to support Hercules.

features.name: Orson Welles
features.origin: George Orson; American radio and motion picture actor and director (1915-1985).

features.name: Clanis Valles
features.origin: Classical river in Etruria; present Chiana River, Italy.

features.name: Pickering
features.origin: Edward Charles; American astronomer (1846-1919), William Henry; American astronomer (1858-1938), Sir William Hayward; New Zealand-American engineer (1910-2004).

features.name: Padus Vallis
features.origin: Classical name for modern Po River in Italy.

features.name: Pohl
features.origin: Frederik George; American science fiction writer (1919-2013).

features.name: Termes Vallis
features.origin: Classical river in ancient Lusitania, present Tormes River, Spain.

features.name: Sklodowska
features.origin: Marie; Polish-born French chemist (Mme P. Curie) (1867-1934).

features.name: Anio Valles
features.origin: Classical river in Italy; modern Aniene and Teverone rivers.

features.name: Deva Vallis
features.origin: Classical name for Dee River in Scotland; new position and coordinates.

features.name: Hermus Vallis
features.origin: Classical name for river in ancient Lydia (modern Turkey).

features.name: Melosh
features.origin: H. Jay; American geophysicist specializing in impact cratering (1947-2020).

features.name: Townsend
features.origin: Marjorie; American electrical engineer and the first woman to manage a spacecraft launch for NASA (1930-2015).

features.name: Zeus Patera
features.origin: Greek sky, thunder and lightning god, who ruled as king of the gods of Mount Olympus.

features.name: Ramanathan
features.origin: Kalpathy Ramakrishna; Indian physicist and meteorologist (1893-1984).

features.name: Barlow
features.origin: Nadine Gail; American planetary scientist who specialized in the impact cratering process, especially on Mars (1958-2020).

features.name: Nordenskiold
features.origin: Nils Adolf Erik; Swedish geologist and geographer, arctic researcher (1832-1901).

features.name: Lopez
features.origin: Epidio López; Mexican astronomer and author (1879-1965).

features.name: Perrotin
features.origin: Henri A.; French astronomer, studied dark lineations on Mars (1845-1904).

features.name: Knudsen
features.origin: Jens Martin; Danish astrophysicist known as the "founder of Danish Mars research" (1930-2005).

features.name: Minami
features.origin: Masatsugu; Japanese physicist and astronomer who observed Martian dust storms (1938-2019).

features.name: Picardi
features.origin: Giovanni; Italian radar scientist who developed the MARSIS radar instrument onboard the Mars Express orbiter (1936-2015).

features.name: Ogygis Undae
features.origin: Named from the classical albedo feature name Ogygis Regio.

features.name: Xanthe Patera
features.origin: Named for classical albedo feature name, Xanthe.

features.name: Simois Colles
features.origin: Classical albedo feature name of Greek origin.

features.name: Blount
features.origin: Katherine “Kit” Hoyt Price; American planetary geologist (1951-2020).

features.name: Babakin
features.origin: Soviet builder of unmanned space stations (1914-1970).

features.name: Cantabras Serpens
features.origin: From nearby albedo feature Cantabras, at 10N, 5W.

features.name: Voeykov
features.origin: A. I.; Russian climatologist and geographer (1842-1916).

features.name: Batson
features.origin: Raymond Milner; American geologist and photogrammetrist (1931-2013).

features.name: Elston
features.origin: Wolfgang; American volcanologist and planetary geologist (1928-2016).

features.name: Dokuchaev
features.origin: Vasily Vasil'evich; Russian soil scientist; founded modern genetical soil science (1840-1903).

features.name: Bunge
features.origin: Andrey Aleksandrovich; Russian zoologist, permafrost investigator (Late 19th century), and Nicolai A.; Russian chemist.

features.name: Barsukov
features.origin: Valery L.; Soviet geochemist and planetologist (1928-1992).

features.name: Papike
features.origin: James J.; American planetary geologist and expert on Martian meteorites (1937-2020).

features.name: Cross
features.origin: Charles Arthur; British astronomer and cartographer (1920-1980).

features.name: Chinju
features.origin: Town in the Republic of Korea.

features.name: Horowitz
features.origin: Norman H.; American biologist and geneticist (1915-2005).

features.name: Danielson
features.origin: G. Edward Danielson, Jr.; American Engineer (1939-2005).

features.name: Kemurdzhian
features.origin: Alexander; Soviet engineer of Armenian descent, founder of the Soviet scientific school of space transport engineering, designer of the first planetary rovers, including lunar Lunokhod 1 and 2, and martian PrOP-M mini-rover onboard Mars 2 and 3 landers (1921-2003).

features.name: Forro
features.origin: Madeleine Barbothy; Hungarian-American specialist on cosmic rays (1904-1995).

features.name: Gandzani
features.origin: Town in the Republic of Georgia.

features.name: Kinkora
features.origin: Town in Prince Edward Island, Canada.

features.name: Sarh
features.origin: Town in the Republic of Chad.

features.name: Ceraunius Catena
features.origin: Named for classical albedo feature at 35N 96W.

features.name: Dubis Vallis
features.origin: Classical name for modern Doubs River, France.

features.name: Labeatis Mons
features.origin: Named for albedo feature Labeatis Lacus.

features.name: Asopus Vallis
features.origin: Classical name for modern Hagios River, Greece.

features.name: Nestus Valles
features.origin: Classical name for river in Macedonia (Greece).

features.name: Hypsas Vallis
features.origin: Classical name for river in Sicily.

features.name: Peace Vallis
features.origin: River in British Columbia and Alberta, Canada.

features.name: Iamuna Dorsa
features.origin: From classical albedo feature Iamunae Sinus.

features.name: Hermes Patera
features.origin: Greek god of trade, travelers, sports, the messenger of the gods, one of the Olympian gods, son of Zeus.

features.name: Fancy
features.origin: Town in Saint Vincent and the Grenadines.

features.name: Davies
features.origin: Merton Edward; American engineer, planetary geodesist (1917-2001).

features.name: Hera Patera
features.origin: Greek goddess of women and marriage, one of the Olympians, wife of Zeus.

features.name: Nicer Vallis
features.origin: Classical name for present Neckar River, Germany.

features.name: Tupa
features.origin: Town in São Paulo state, Brazil.

features.name: Majuro
features.origin: Capital of the Republic of the Marshall Islands.

features.name: Otepa
features.origin: Village in Hao atoll, Tuamotu Archipelago, French Polynesia.

features.name: Dogana
features.origin: Town in the Republic of San Marino.

features.name: Kolonga
features.origin: Town in the Kingdom of Tonga.

features.name: Luba
features.origin: Town in the Republic of Equatorial Guinea.

features.name: Arago Dorsa
features.origin: Named for nearby Arago crater; Dominique F.; French astronomer (1786-1853).

features.name: Bombala
features.origin: Town in New S. Wales, Australia.

features.name: Paros
features.origin: Famous in antiquity for its marble quarries.

features.name: Rahe
features.origin: Jurgen; American astronomer and NASA program director (1940-1997).

features.name: Lucaya
features.origin: Town in the Commonwealth of the Bahamas.

features.name: Neretva Vallis
features.origin: River in Bosnia and Herzegovina and Croatia.

features.name: Apollo Patera
features.origin: Greek god of light, poetry, music and arts, one of the Olympian gods, son of Zeus.

features.name: Changsong
features.origin: Town in the Democratic People's Republic of Korea.

features.name: Sibiti
features.origin: Town in the Republic of Congo (Congo-Brazzaville).

features.name: Dionysus Patera
features.origin: Greek god of wine, celebration and ecstasy, patron god of the art and theatre, one of the Olympian gods, son of Zeus.

features.name: Nectaris Patera
features.origin: Named for classical albedo feature name, Nectaris.

features.name: Dia Cau
features.origin: Town in the Socialist Republic of Vietnam.

features.name: Llanesco
features.origin: Probably named for Llanes, a town in Spain.

features.name: Taejin
features.origin: Town in the Republic of Korea.

features.name: Milna
features.origin: Town in the Republic of Croatia.

features.name: Cayon
features.origin: Town in Saint Kitts and Nevis.

features.name: Gunjur
features.origin: Town in the Republic of Gambia.

features.name: Athena Patera
features.origin: Greek goddess of wisdom, one of the Olympians, daughter of Zeus.

features.name: Doba
features.origin: Town in the Republic of Chad.

features.name: Gali
features.origin: Town in the Republic of Georgia.

features.name: Zhufan
features.origin: Village in Donghai County, Lianyungang City, Jiangsu Province, China.

features.name: Neves
features.origin: Town in the Republic of Sao Tome and Principe.

features.name: Balboa
features.origin: Town in the Republic of Panama, formerly within the US Panama Canal Zone.

features.name: Thira
features.origin: Town on Santorini Island in the Aegean Sea.

features.name: Rongxar
features.origin: Small village in Tibet, near Mt. Everest.

features.name: Tignish
features.origin: Town in Prince Edward Island, Canada.

features.name: Gan
features.origin: Town in the Republic of the Maldives.

features.name: Munda Vallis
features.origin: Classical name for river in ancient Lusitania, (modern Mondega River in Portugal).

features.name: Cooma
features.origin: Town in New South Wales, Australia.

features.name: Lowbury
features.origin: Named for a town in New Zealand, probably Lowburn incorrectly recorded as Lowbury.

features.name: Noctis Tholus
features.origin: Classical albedo feature name, Noctis Lacus.

features.name: Palikir
features.origin: Capital of the Federated States of Micronesia.

features.name: Obock
features.origin: Town in the Republic of Djibouti.

features.name: Banh
features.origin: Town in Burkina Faso (formerly Upper Volta).

features.name: Kalba
features.origin: Town in the United Arab Emirates.

features.name: Domoni
features.origin: Town in the Union of the Comoros.

features.name: Gagra
features.origin: Town in the Republic of Georgia.

features.name: Kribi
features.origin: Town in the United Republic of Cameroon.

features.name: Wukan
features.origin: Village in Lufeng City, Guangdong Province, China.

features.name: Triolet
features.origin: Town in the Republic of Mauritius.

features.name: Niquero
features.origin: Town in the Republic of Cuba.

features.name: Isara Valles
features.origin: Classical name for modern Oise River in France.

features.name: Daiyang
features.origin: Village in Shouning County, Ningde City, Fujian Province, China.

features.name: Krupac
features.origin: Town in the municipality of Pirot, Serbia.

features.name: Una Vallis
features.origin: River in Bosnia and Herzegovina and Croatia.

features.name: Hamelin
features.origin: Old German town referred to in the Pied Piper fairy tale.

features.name: Weert
features.origin: Town in the Netherlands. (Spelling corrected from Weer.)

features.name: Igal
features.origin: Town in Hungary. Name changed from Igol (incorrect spelling).

features.name: Naju
features.origin: Town in the Republic of Korea.

features.name: Victoria
features.origin: Town in the Republic of Seychelles.

features.name: Gratteri
features.origin: Town on the island of Sicily, Italy.

features.name: Avire
features.origin: Town in the Republic of Vanuatu.

features.name: Bam
features.origin: Town in Kermān province in Iran.

features.name: Gori
features.origin: town in the Republic of Georgia.

features.name: Kenge
features.origin: Town in Democratic Republic of the Congo.

features.name: Galap
features.origin: Town in the Republic of Palau.

features.name: Culter
features.origin: Village near Aberdeen, Scotland, also called Peterculter.

features.name: Farim
features.origin: Town in the Republic of Guinea-Bissau.

features.name: Laf
features.origin: Town in the United Republic of Cameroon.

features.name: Vaduz
features.origin: Capital of the Principality of Liechtenstein.

features.name: Johannesburg
features.origin: Republic of South Africa tracking site.

features.name: Airy 0
features.origin: Small crater within crater Airy that defines zero degrees longitude on Mars.

features.name: Yellowknife
features.origin: Town in the Northwest Territories, Canada.

features.name: Aeolis
features.origin: Floating island where winds were kept in a cave.

features.name: Aeria
features.origin: Greek name for Egypt; "far land of mist".

features.name: Aethiopis
features.origin: Countries of the Ethiopians on southern edge of the Earth.

features.name: Amazonis
features.origin: Land of the Amazons; on the island Hesperia.

features.name: Amenthes
features.origin: Egyptian name for place where souls of the dead go.

features.name: Argyre
features.origin: "Silver" Island at mouth of Ganges River; present-day Arakan, Burma.

features.name: Arnon
features.origin: Classical name for present El-Mojib River, Jordan.

features.name: Aurorae Sinus
features.origin: "Bay of Rosy Dawn"; Aurora held back the dawn.

features.name: Ausonia
features.origin: Country of the Aruncii (Ausones in Greek).

features.name: Baltia
features.origin: Name of large island in northern Europe where amber was found.

features.name: Boreosyrtis
features.origin: Northern continuation of Nilosyrtis; "Syrtis of the north."

features.name: Casius
features.origin: Epithet of Zeus; for his two sanctuaries in Egypt/Arabia and Syria.

features.name: Cebrenia
features.origin: Main country of the Trojan Plain.

features.name: Cecropia
features.origin: Old name for Acropolis; used to mean Athens.

features.name: Ceraunius
features.origin: "Thunderclap"; named for Ceraunii Mountains on coast of Epirus, Greece.

features.name: Cerberus
features.origin: Hound who had 3 heads; guarded gates of hell.

features.name: Chalce
features.origin: Old name of island of Khalki, west of Rhodes.

features.name: Chryse
features.origin: Island rich in gold; region of Thailand/Malacca.

features.name: Chrysokeras
features.origin: "Golden Horn"; Byzantine Peninsula (now Turkey), or its inlet.

features.name: Copais Palus
features.origin: Named for marsh north of Mt. Helicon in Boeotia, Greece.

features.name: Coprates
features.origin: Old name for Persian River Ab-I-Diz.

features.name: Deltoton Sinus
features.origin: "Bay of the triangle"; makes triangle with Iapygia and Oenotria.

features.name: Deucalionis Regio
features.origin: "Deucalion's region;" Deucalion was King of Thessaly who saved himself from flood.

features.name: Deuteronilus
features.origin: Designation of 2nd part of old feature "Nilus."

features.name: Diacria
features.origin: Highland area in northern Attica, Greece.

features.name: Dioscuria
features.origin: "Home of Dioscuri," Polydeuces and Pollux; symbolic name for Sparta.

features.name: Edom
features.origin: Biblical country of Edomites, south of Judea.

features.name: Electris
features.origin: Electra's island near River Eridanus; famous for amber formed from tears shed by Phaethon's sisters.

features.name: Elysium
features.origin: Home of the blessed on western edge of world.

features.name: Eridania
features.origin: Region on the Po River, Italy.

features.name: Eunostos
features.origin: "Lucky journey or lucky return"; i.e., infernal regions beyond Elysium.

features.name: Gehon
features.origin: Biblical second River of Paradise; bordering Eden.

features.name: Hesperia
features.origin: "The Occiden"; name for Italy (Greek); or Spain (Roman) or West area of Ethiopians where sun sank.

features.name: Hiddekel
features.origin: Tigris River, Babylonia; Biblical third River of Paradise.

features.name: Iapygia  Iapigia
features.origin: Classically, Iapygia was all of Apulia, or just the Salentine Peninsula.

features.name: II Thyle I
features.origin: Named for Thule; may be middle Norway; used to indicate far northern lands.

features.name: Ismenius Lacus
features.origin: "Ismenian Lake"; Ismenia is poetic term for Thebes.

features.name: Juventae Fons
features.origin: The "Fountain of Youth;" a fountain in India.

features.name: Laestrygon  Laestrigon
features.origin: Man-eating giants who lived in the west.

features.name: Lemuria
features.origin: Designation of purported drowned continent south of India; also relates to lemur monkeys found on Madagascar and Sunda Islands.

features.name: Libya
features.origin: Area from W. Egypt to greater Syrtis.

features.name: Lunae Palus
features.origin: Roman Moon goddess Luna; "Luna's Swamp," or African Lunae Mountains where Nile was thought to originate.

features.name: Mare Acidalium
features.origin: Name for Acidalian (Venusian) fountain in Boeotia where the Graces bathed.

features.name: Mare Chronium
features.origin: "Cronian Sea", northern part of World Sea where eternal dead calm, dangerous to ships, prevailed.

features.name: Mare Cimmerium
features.origin: Cimmerians were ancient Thracian seafarers; "far western sea" (Homer).

features.name: Mare Tyrrhenum
features.origin: Tyrrhenian Sea, between Italy and Sicily.

features.name: Margaritifer Sinus
features.origin: "Pearl Bay," after Pearl Coast, South India.

features.name: Memnonia
features.origin: Land of Memnon, King of Ethiopia.

features.name: Meroe
features.origin: Ethiopian island on Nile; now Atbar.

features.name: Moeris Lacus
features.origin: "Moeris Lake;" Moeris was Egyptian lake in Libyan Desert.

features.name: Nectar
features.origin: Named for the drink of the gods.

features.name: Nereidum Fretum
features.origin: "Straits of the Nereids", who were sea nymphs.

features.name: Nilokeras
features.origin: "Horn of the Nile;" part of "Nulus" Canal.

features.name: Nilosyrtis
features.origin: Syrtis of the Nile; part of Nilus (Nile) Canal.

features.name: Nix Olympica
features.origin: "Snows of Olympus;" Olympus was mountain home of gods in Greece.

features.name: Ogygis Regio
features.origin: "Region of Ogygos;" Ogygos was ancient King of Thebes or Athens, Greece.

features.name: Ophir
features.origin: Biblical land to which King Solomon sent naval expedition; probably India.

features.name: Ortygia
features.origin: Floating island (present Delos) where Leto bore Apollo and Artemis.

features.name: Oxia Palus
features.origin: Lake (swamp into which Oxus River flows; i.e. Sea of Aral).

features.name: Panchaia
features.origin: Situated near Heliopolis, Egypt; or island in Red Sea rich in frankincense, gold, silver, thus Utopia.

features.name: Pandorae Fretum
features.origin: Woman who let loose evils of world when she opened a box.

features.name: Phaethontis
features.origin: "Of Phaethon;" who recklessly drove Chariot of Sun.

features.name: Phoenicis Lacus
features.origin: "Lake of the Phoenix;" Arabia or India.

features.name: Phrixi Regio
features.origin: "Phrixus' Region;" Phrixus and sister Helle escaped sacrifice in Boeotia on back of ram with golden fleece.

features.name: Propontis
features.origin: The Sea of Marmora, Asia Minor.

features.name: Protei Regio
features.origin: "Proteus' Region;" Proteus was a sea god with a gift of prophecy.

features.name: Protonilus
features.origin: Designation of first (Eastern) part of "Nilus" or Nile Canal.

features.name: Pyrrhae Regio
features.origin: "Pyrrha's Region;" named for Pyrrha, wife of Deucalion.

features.name: Sinai
features.origin: Biblical; named for area next to Mare Erythraeum (Indian Ocean).

features.name: Sinus Sabaeus
features.origin: Today's Red Sea; Saba was part of southern Arabian Peninsula.

features.name: Sithonius Lacus
features.origin: Region inhabited by Sithonii; synonym of Thrace.

features.name: Solis Lacus
features.origin: "Lake of the Sun"; the so-called "Eye of Mars," connecting East with West.

features.name: Styx
features.origin: Great river around nether region, which souls must cross on journey from Earth.

features.name: Syria
features.origin: Province in Near East including Phoenicia; or one of the Cyclades (Homer).

features.name: Syrtis Major
features.origin: Libyan Gulf, now Gulf of Sirte.

features.name: Tempe
features.origin: Greek valley south of Mt. Olympus noted for its beauty.

features.name: Tharsis
features.origin: Connecting link between East and West; ancient Spanish town Tartessus.

features.name: Thaumasia
features.origin: Named for Thaumas, god of clouds; Arabia.

features.name: Thymiamata
features.origin: "Land of sweet-scented perfumes"; South Yemen or India.

features.name: Tithonius Lacus
features.origin: "Tithonian Lake"; Tithonus received from his wife Eos eternal life but not eternal youth.

features.name: Trivium Charontis
features.origin: "Crossroad of Charon"; meeting place of several netherworld Canals.

features.name: Vulcani Pelagus
features.origin: Named for Vulcan, Roman god of fire.

features.name: Yaonis Regio
features.origin: Named for Chinese Emperor Yao; flood occurred during his reign.
